community.name: Khushi Tayal
community.description:
Hi, I'm Khushi Tayal, a counselling psychologist with a deep curiosity for people and the stories they carry.
With a Master’s in Counselling Psychology and a soft spot for stories that heal, I blend science with soul to create safe spaces for people to just... be.
My approach blends evidence-based techniques with a humanistic, person-centred lens. Whether it’s facilitating group therapy or guiding one-on-one sessions, I believe in walking with my clients, not ahead of them.
I'm not here to "fix" you, I'm here to walk with you, laugh with you, maybe cry a bit, and remind you that healing isn’t linear, but it is possible.
Let’s make therapy feel human again.

offerings.title: Therapy
offerings.description:
Hi, I’m Khushi Tayal, a Counselling Psychologist. 
If you have landed here, chances are you are carrying something heavy- stress, grief, confusion, or maybe just the weight of feeling “not enough.” First, take a breath. You are not alone, and you don’t have to figure it all out by yourself.

I work with adults, young adults, and caregivers navigating emotional overwhelm, self-worth struggles, anxiety, relationship concerns, and major life transitions. My approach is empathetic, non-judgmental, and collaborative, rooted in evidence-based practices like CBT, trauma-informed care, and person-centred therapy.
Let’s start your journey toward healing and clarity one conversation at a time.

This call is designed to ensure we are a good fit and to make you feel informed and comfortable before we begin our work together.

community.name: Postpartum Rebound with Kirti
community.description:
💪 Reclaim Your Body & Confidence – Even with a Full-Time Job and a Baby on Your Hip!
Being a mom is tough. Being a working mom? That’s a whole different level. Sleepless nights, work stress, endless to-do lists — and somewhere in between, you’re told to “just exercise” and “eat clean.”

But your body has changed after pregnancy…
Your hormones have shifted…
And you don’t have the luxury of 2 hours in the gym or following some fancy influencer’s diet.

That’s exactly why I created the Postpartum Fat Loss Program — specially designed for busy working moms over 30 who want real, lasting results without sacrificing their career or their sanity.
✅ What Makes This Program Different?
🔸 Hormone- & Metabolism-Friendly Plans: Tailored for postpartum recovery and sustainable fat loss, even with thyroid or PCOD.

🔸 No Gym Required: Home-based workouts designed to fit into a 20–30 min window, even with a toddler around!

🔸 Indian Diets That Heal: No crash diets. No imported powders. Just simple, delicious, real Indian food.

🔸 Mindset + Motivation: Tools to manage cravings, emotional eating, and mental burnout.

🔸 Personal Support & Accountability: Weekly check-ins, habit tracking, and real-time support so you never feel alone.

💬 Who Is This For?
Working moms who want to lose 10–25 kgs postpartum

Women struggling with belly fat, fatigue, and low confidence

Moms dealing with PCOD, thyroid issues, or slow metabolism

Anyone tired of one-size-fits-all diets and gym guilt

🧡 From One Mom to Another…
I’m Coach Kirti, a certified Fat Loss & Mindset Coach, a mom of 2, and a former 89-kg postpartum woman who once cried in the trial room. I’ve helped 1000+ women transform not just their bodies—but their lives.

Now it’s your turn.
It’s not too late.
And you’re not too far gone.

🎯 Ready to Feel Like You Again?
Join my 90-day Postpartum Fat Loss Program and finally get the structure, support, and strategy to become the confident, energetic, empowered woman you were always meant to be.

👉 Tap the button below to apply now.

offerings.title: Postpartum rebound with Kirti
offerings.description:
Hey Supermom! 🙌
Here’s exactly what we’ll talk about in our first 30-minute Discovery Call.  so you know you’re in safe, expert hands:

⸻

1️⃣ Understanding Your Journey

We’ll start by getting to know you:
	•	How long postpartum are you?
	•	Any delivery complications or current health issues (like thyroid, PCOD, diastasis recti)?
	•	Your current lifestyle, work schedule & sleep routine
	•	Breastfeeding status (if applicable)

⸻

2️⃣ Your Fitness & Fat Loss Goals

Let’s talk real:
	•	What are your current struggles—belly fat, energy, motivation?
	•	What does “feeling like yourself again” look like for you?
	•	What would a win look like 3 months from now?

⸻

3️⃣ What You’re Eating Right Now

I’ll ask about:
	•	A rough idea of your daily meals
	•	Any food aversions, cravings, emotional eating triggers
	•	Cooking access/time (especially for working moms or navy wives!)

⸻

4️⃣ Movement & Mindset
	•	Are you exercising currently? If yes, how often and what type?
	•	Any physical limitations or fear around starting?
	•	We’ll also touch on your emotional well-being, motivation, and stress levels—because fat loss is never just about food.

⸻

5️⃣ How My Program Works

You’ll get a clear breakdown of:
	•	What’s included in your 90-day plan (custom workouts, flexible nutrition, mindset resets, daily accountability)
	•	How we’ll track progress & stay in touch
	•	What support looks like (no cookie-cutter PDFs here!)

⸻

🎁 BONUS:

You’ll leave the call with:
✅ 1 quick-action tip to start immediately
✅ Clarity on how we’ll work together
✅ A judgment-free space to ask any questions

offerings.title: Bach Flower Remedy Course
offerings.description:
Discover the power of Bach Flower Remedies in our comprehensive course. This in-depth program provides you with the knowledge and practical skills to become a confident practitioner.

Over a series of one-hour daily sessions, you'll dive deep into the world of the 38 individual Bach Flower Remedies. Our interactive online sessions cover the foundational philosophy of Dr. Edward Bach, the specific emotional states each remedy addresses, and the positive potential they help restore.

You will learn about each of the 38 flowers in detail, including how to differentiate between similar remedies and their real-world applications. We’ll also cover the famous Rescue Remedy, its uses, and its role in a Bach Flower practice.

Beyond theory, you'll gain practical skills in preparing custom remedy bottles, correct dosages, and the intuitive art of client consultation.

This course is perfect for anyone seeking a tool for personal emotional well-being, as well as for holistic healers, therapists, and wellness coaches looking to add a gentle and effective modality to their practice. Join us to begin your journey to emotional balance.

offerings.title: Vibrate Higher: Beginner's Guide to Crystals

You will learn about the human energy field and how crystals interact with chakras. We will cover the specific properties of a wide range of crystals, teaching you how to select, cleanse, and program them for your needs.

The course provides practical healing techniques for yourself and others. You'll learn how to create personal crystal layouts, conduct healing sessions, and use crystals for chakra balancing. A special focus is on the art of the crystal grid, covering sacred geometry, grid creation, and activation for manifestation. You'll leave with the knowledge to integrate these powerful stones into every aspect of your life.

community.name: The Clarity Lab
community.description:
Welcome to The Clarity Lab!

🌟 Created by a psychology student with 9 years of corporate experience, this Guild is born from firsthand understanding of what it means to navigate pressure, purpose, and personal growth in today's world.

Here, we blend heart, science, and shared experience to create a safe space for people juggling work stress, anxiety, burnout, and life’s harder questions. You’ll find:

🧘‍♂️ Guided mindfulness practices to create calm amid chaos

🔍 Psychology-informed tools for resilience, clarity, and confidence

💬 Real talk about imposter syndrome, identity crises, corporate fatigue, and emotional overwhelm

🤝 Community circles where every emotion is valid and every voice is welcome

🌿 Ongoing support for reflection, healing, and intentional growth

This Guild isn’t just a collection of tips—it’s a personal mission to hold space for those who feel like they’re “functioning” but not truly living. If you’re ready to turn insight into action, and overwhelm into clarity—you’re home.

offerings.title: The Burnout Recovery Plan
offerings.description:
🔥 The Burnout Recovery Plan
A trauma-informed, psychology-backed survival mode to sustainable energy and clarity.

🧍‍♀️ Who This Is For:
Corporate professionals overwhelmed by deadlines and expectations
Students caught in high-pressure loops of performance and self-doubt
Anyone feeling numb, exhausted, or emotionally “checked out”
Sensitive, ambitious souls who want more than just coping—they want healing

🧭 What You’ll Walk Away With:

A renewed relationship with productivity—based on purpose, not pressure
Personal rituals for emotional balance and nervous system support
Clarity on boundaries, values, and what actually matters
A felt sense of community and psychological safety

📆 Weekly Immersive Themes:

Week 1: “Mapping the Burnout Terrain”

Identify your personal burnout patterns: physical, cognitive, emotional
Mini self-assessment + Burnout Inventory
Introduction to nervous system basics: fight, flight, freeze, fawn
Guided meditation: “Coming Home to Self”

Week 2: “Reclaim the Self”

Rediscover your inner compass beyond productivity
Daily grounding practices (5–15 min)
Energy audit: what drains vs. what fuels you
Reflective writing: “The Cost of Coping”

Week 3: “Boundaries Are Self-Compassion”

Learn to say no without shame
Scripts for tricky workplace/personal conversations
Somatic check-ins to identify boundary breaches
Bonus video: “Guilt vs. Responsibility”

Week 4: “Rebuild with Intention”

Craft your unique anti-burnout blueprint
Define your personal metrics for a good day
Design a “Reset Ritual” for hard moments
Visioning practice: Where do I grow from here?

It's going to be a 4 session plan that would offer you healing from burnout and get out from the trap of toxicity.

offerings.title: Discovery Call
offerings.description:
This is a soft beginning.

A 40-60 minute video call where we arrive not in urgency, but in presence.
Together, we’ll explore what’s calling you toward rest, restoration, or deeper emotional healing. You’re welcome to share your story, your curiosities, or simply be held in silence as you feel into what support might look like.

There is no pressure to commit—this is a moment of mutual alignment, of listening to what your body and heart truly need.

What to Expect:
A calm, spacious conversation held with care.
A chance to share what you're seeking or navigating.
An introduction to the tools and spaces I offer (one-on-one guidance, journals, meditations, or workshops).

We may speak about:
1. What you’re seeking support with—rest, emotional healing, ancestral connection, or inner safety.
2. What offerings may serve you best (journaling journeys, workshops, meditations, or one-on-one support).
3. Any questions you may carry about my approach, tools, or the sacred rhythm of this work

Questions are welcome. Boundaries are respected. Silence is sacred.

This Call Is For You If:
1. You are curious about working with me and want to feel into the energy first.
2. You’re navigating emotional fatigue, heartache, or transition, and need softer support
3. You’re seeking a trauma-aware, reverent, and nervous-system-safe approach to healing
4. You want to return to your inner rhythms—and are unsure where to begin

You don’t need to prepare. Just come as you are.
You are welcome to come just as you are—tender, curious, guarded, or unsure.
This is not a sales call. It is a meeting in stillness. A shared breath. A soft doorway. Let’s breathe together, and see what unfolds.

Sometimes, healing begins the moment someone truly listens.
Before we walk together, let’s sit for a moment and see if our paths speak the same language.

community.name: Holistic Essence Therapy - Manpreet Kaur (Counselling Psychologist & Psychotherapist)
community.description:
Hello, I am Manpreet Kaur, a Psychotherapist. I provide counseling and psychotherapy services. As a holistic and integrative therapist, I strive to create a safe, empathetic, and non-judgmental environment where you can feel heard, supported, and empowered.
My approach to therapy is insight-oriented and non-judgmental, creating a safe and confidential space for you to explore your inner world. Understanding the roots of your struggles is a powerful first step toward lasting change.
I employ an integrative approach, combining various modalities to create a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs. These include:
- Psychodynamic principles, which primarily guide my practice, mean we will explore how your past experiences and unconscious patterns may be influencing your present thoughts, feelings, and behaviors. By gaining a deeper awareness of these patterns, you can begin to make more conscious and empowering choices.
- Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) and Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) to help you develop practical skills for managing difficult emotions, challenging unhelpful thought patterns, and improving relationships.
- Mindfulness practices to help you cultivate present-moment awareness, reduce stress, and connect with your inner wisdom.
- Existential and psychospiritual principles to explore questions of meaning, purpose, and personal growth, helping you find a sense of deeper fulfillment.
- Positive psychology to focus on your strengths and resources, helping you build resilience and thrive.

By weaving these different perspectives together, we can create a holistic path to healing and growth that honors all aspects of who you are.

Together, we can work through challenges and discover your inner strength, one step at a time. 

Qualifications: 

- M.A. Psychology
- M.A. Sikh Studies
- CBT - advanced training certification
- Mindfulness - practitioner course
- UGC-NET Psychology qualified
- Trainee therapist for 10 months at Reboot Wellness
- I remain committed to continuous learning through a variety of certificate programs and training sessions that aim to broaden and deepen my understanding.
